title: BBS Structure Addon
description: BBS StructureForm Addon, as its name suggests, allows the use of structures in the official BBS. This form can also be found in BBS CML EDITION, from which this addon is based.
body:
# 🌳 BBS StructureForm Addon

Bring back a fan-favorite feature! Highly requested by the community—especially by those who remember Blockbuster (1.12)—the beloved **Structure Form** from the **BBS CML EDITION** fork is now available as a standalone addon.

You can now enjoy this powerful tool on the **Official BBS** and other forks!

### ✨ What It Does

With this addon, you can use any saved Minecraft structure as a replay element for your animations. Whenever your scene requires an entire structure to be animated or manipulated, this addon has you covered.

---

### 🛠️ How to Use

Getting started is quick and easy:

1. **Create and save** your desired structure using a standard Minecraft **Structure Block**.
2. Open the **Forms Selection Menu** and look for the **Tree icon**.
3. Select the tree, which will take you to the Forms Editor.
4. Use the new option to **select the structure you saved**, and you are ready to animate!

---

### ⚠️ Support & Limitations

Please note that due to underlying technical limitations, **it is unlikely this addon will receive new features or major performance improvements** in the future.

> **💡 Looking for the ultimate experience?**
> If you want a fully optimized environment with the most complete set of tools, we highly recommend using the full **[BBS: CML EDITION](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbs-cml-edition)** fork instead!

![an example of what the structural model could be used for](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/095268e8abd047da4716ce961313174978b2d87e_0.webp)
